channel.title: Distributed-Memory on a.dev
channel.description: Recent content in Distributed-Memory on a.dev

item.title: Parallel Rank-Adaptive Higher Order Orthogonal Iteration
item.description: This paper presents distributed-memory parallel, rank-adaptive algorithms for higher order orthogonal iteration (HOOI) for Tucker decomposition

item.title: DistShap: Scalable GNN Explanations with Distributed Shapley Values
item.description: This paper presents DistShap, a distributed, multi-GPU algorithm for computing Shapley value-based explanations of GNN predictions

item.title: Scalable Dual Coordinate Descent for Kernel Methods
item.description: This paper presents communication-avoiding, s-step dual coordinate descent methods for kernel SVM and kernel ridge regression. Winner of the HPC Asia 2025 Outstanding Paper Award.

item.title: Communication-Efficient, 2D Parallel Stochastic Gradient Descent for Distributed-Memory Optimization
item.description: This paper presents HybridSGD, a 2D parallel stochastic gradient descent method that trades off communication between s-step SGD and Federated Averaging
